name: Porterhouse Steak with Hoisin Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the steak with salt and pepper.
2. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl.
3. Grill the porterhouse for 5 minutes on each side, basting with the sauce.
4. Serve with grilled scallions and cast iron potato salad.
